name: babysitter
description: Enables Claude Code to manage sophisticated development workflows through deterministic, resumable orchestration. Provides agent lifecycle management, workflow plugins, and a structured task dispatcher.

findings_summary.notes: Organization-backed repo (a5c-ai) with 336 stars, MIT license, active discussions and 5 open issues. JavaScript monorepo with packages/, plugins/, and .claude-plugin/ structure. Includes a test-dispatcher.js, pnpm workspace, and e2e tests. .claude directory contains settings and a skills folder. Actively maintained (pushed Feb 26, 2026). Code execution involved (Node.js orchestration scripts). No malicious patterns found. Slightly elevated complexity warrants code review before production use.
